summary: All 8 acceptance criteria verified. 38 daemon index tests pass (0 fail). 2 pre-existing envoy infra failures unrelated to this change. TypeScript type check clean. Biome lint clean.

criteriaResults.evidence: Test: marks running worker as dead when session is missing from serve — PATCH called with status=dead, crashCount incremented
Single listActiveSessions() call per tick in index.ts:718, result reused for all workers in loop
Tests: skips liveness sweep when serve is unhealthy, skips liveness sweep when serve was just restarted — listActiveSessionsCalls.toHaveLength(0)
Test: skips liveness sweep and marks no workers dead when listActiveSessions throws — patchCalls.toHaveLength(0)
Liveness check PATCHes /workers/:id with status=dead, crashCount+1, lastCrashAt. PATCH handler in server.ts:1230 updates crashHistory, calls detachWorkerFromEnvoy, persists state
feedbackLogger.log({event: daemon.worker_reaped, workerId, sessionId, mode, serveType, reason: session_missing}) at index.ts:749. Test in feedback.test.ts verifies event schema
No role/multi-serve infrastructure exists in codebase. serveType hardcoded to shared which is correct for current architecture. AC7 is conditional (if role serves are configured)
listActiveSessions(): Promise<Set<string>> added to RuntimeAdapter interface (types.ts:37) and implemented in OpenCodeAdapter (opencode.ts:150) via client.session.status() bulk endpoint
